untranslatable_reason: Signal requires Fibonacci retracement level calculation (38%, 50%, 62% of prior rise/fall) and identification of psychological whole dollar support levels. These are derived calculations not available as base indicators. The signal also references 'smart money accumulation' which cannot be quantified with allowed indicators. Volume increase at specific price levels requires multi-bar pattern recognition beyond allowed operators.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture volume increase condition and price rebound direction, but core pattern—Fibonacci retrace levels and their interaction with whole dollar amounts—requires custom indicator calculation not available in the allowed set. A proper backtest would need custom_fibonacci_retrace() and psychological_level_detection() functions.
